title: search_tablets data payload
description: Structured payload for the `search_tablets` tool. CDLI catalog search results paged by `limit`. `page_estimate` is derived from the Link header `rel="last"` cursor; absent when CDLI does not return one.

count_returned.description: Number of artifact records on this response page.

page_estimate.description: Approximate total match count derived from the Link header. The range bounds the last-page-fill uncertainty.

cdli_id.description: CDLI integer database id. Use this with `get_tablet`, NOT the P/Q-number — the /artifacts/{id} route 404s on P-numbers.

p_number.description: CDLI P/Q composite number when assigned (some artifacts have `composite_no: "needed"`, which we surface as absent).

provenience.description: Findspot. Omitted when CDLI labels it `uncertain` — see the source response if you need the raw value.
